item.title: Design
item.description: Launcher — Design Document Date: 2026-04-19 | Status: Early design — work in progress 1. Vision Launcher is an OAM-native package manager for Kubernetes — a semantically richer alternative to Helm. Where Helm templates Kubernetes manifests from Go template files and a flat values.yaml, launcher models deployments using the Open Application Model (OAM) as its package format. The result is a tool where application structure is explicit and typed, platform implementation choices are separated from application choices, and output is always static, GitOps-ready Kubernetes manifests.
